orphaned_properties.synopsis: The who what where and why of Project Talus

properties.name: Diagnostics
properties.ccafc508-72f6-4ca2-66dc-26319639d1a5:
[SCENE]Studio
[HOOK]Have you ever wondered how to make sure your vintage car purchase is ready to be a reliable daily driver and won't leave you on the side of the road with a tow truck bill or worse? Then stay tuned for Project Talus
[VISUAL]Intro clip

properties.name: Emission Test
properties.6b1ecc54-6188-8abb-e434-c1b1162077b2: I was told I couldn't shoot by an employee, no signs where posted but I let it go.

properties.name: Check Tire Pressure
properties.6b1ecc54-6188-8abb-e434-c1b1162077b2:
Front driver = 26.1psig
Front passenger = 26.5psig
Rear Driver = 19.8psig
Rear passenger = 28.1psig

properties.name: Check Tire Tread Depth
properties.6b1ecc54-6188-8abb-e434-c1b1162077b2:
Rear driver: inner = >9/32" mid = >7/32" outer = 8/32
Front driver: inner = >2/32" mid = >6/32" outer = >9/32"
Front passenger: inner = >5/32" mid = >8/32" outer = >9/32"
Rear passenger: inner = 8/32" mid = 7/32" outer = >9/32"

properties.name: Check Tire Age
properties.6b1ecc54-6188-8abb-e434-c1b1162077b2: tire date code is 1723 so the tires where manufactured the 17th week of 2023

properties.name: Check Brake Pad Thickness
properties.6b1ecc54-6188-8abb-e434-c1b1162077b2:
Left front is at 3mm
Right front is at 4mm

properties.name: Check Brake Fluid Corroson
properties.6b1ecc54-6188-8abb-e434-c1b1162077b2: Failed, it full of corrosion and needs replaced.

properties.name: Check Coolant Acidity
properties.6b1ecc54-6188-8abb-e434-c1b1162077b2: Coolant ph was an 9-11 checked out fine.

properties.name: Check Coolant Specific Gravity
properties.6b1ecc54-6188-8abb-e434-c1b1162077b2: Coolant freeze protection was plenty for Colorado. Visually it looked new and without any contamination.

properties.name: Check Fuel Pressure
properties.6b1ecc54-6188-8abb-e434-c1b1162077b2: Pressurized to 22 psi. Hopefully the result of a plugged fuel filter. Will recheck after replacing the fuel filter.

properties.name: Check Computer Codes
properties.6b1ecc54-6188-8abb-e434-c1b1162077b2:
Codes are 12 = RPM idle out of range/high.
41 = HEGO (H02S) sensor signal out of range/always lean 
these two codes lead to a likely diagnosis of a vacuum leak.
75=Brake On/Off (BOO) switch fault / closed circuit caused by the led lights with no load resistor

properties.name: Test Alternator
properties.6b1ecc54-6188-8abb-e434-c1b1162077b2: Alternator passes putting out 14.6 volts at idle

properties.name: Coolant System Pressure Test
properties.6b1ecc54-6188-8abb-e434-c1b1162077b2: Found three leaks at hose clamps one on the inlet to the water pump, one on the outlet of the water pump and one on the heater hoses at the fire wall. Clear rust on the clamp at the firewall. Filled up with 50/50 mix to top off and replaced the radiator cap that only held 11 psi of pressure instead of 13 psi.

properties.name: Tune Up
properties.ccafc508-72f6-4ca2-66dc-26319639d1a5: [NOTE]Talk about brake fluid and why we use the formulation we do for it. Talk about freezing and boiling point. Talk about why it's hygroscopic and why that is a good thing.
